# Student Data Cleaning and Visualization Project

## Objective
Clean and visualize a student performance dataset.

## Tools Used
- Python
- Pandas
- Matplotlib

## Steps Performed
- Loaded dataset
- Checked missing values
- Checked duplicates
- Removed duplicates
- Created visualizations
- Saved cleaned data

## Generated Files
- cleaned_student.csv
- math_distribution.png
- gender_comparison.png
- reading_boxplot.png
